notes:
NovaPanel v0.7.26

- Test-update deep-link mode. Env var NOVAPANEL_TEST_UPDATE=1 or CLI flag --test-update activates an automated canary path that drives the existing updater check / download / install pipeline without UI navigation. Absent the env var and flag, normal user behavior is unchanged - branch is gated entirely behind isEnabled().
- New module test-update/index.js exports isEnabled() + runTestUpdate(). Orchestrator calls testSupport.updater.checkForUpdate -> testSupport.updater.downloadUpdate -> testSupport.installUpdateFromZip - the same functions the UI uses. No re-implementation of check/download/install logic.
- test-support/index.js: install handler body lifted to a named local function installUpdateFromZip; IPC registration becomes a one-line delegate; module exports installUpdateFromZip + updater so test-update can call them. Body is byte-identical to v0.7.25.
- main.js: gate inside the existing whenReady block, after testSupport.init / registerIpc. 1500ms delay before orchestrator runs so init settles. no-update path triggers app.quit; install path lets the helper drive shutdown (existing behavior).
- All test-update logs prefixed [test-update]. Updater helper / verify / release / build scripts / test harness classification / app.asar copy: byte-identical to v0.7.25.
